context_for_next_testing_agent: Golf Groups feature fully implemented and tested. Key data-testids: service-golf_groups, golf-groups-details, group-type-society, group-type-friends, players-4-8, players-8-12, players-12-20, players-20+, transfer-type-sedan, transfer-type-minibus, transfer-type-coach, trip-group-name. Step 4 shows Society/Club name field and summary includes group type, players, and per-person budget.
